title: AriaCast Control Command Message
description: JSON text frame sent by the Sender (or external controller) to the Receiver via the /control WebSocket. Used by the Python server only; the Go server ignores incoming WebSocket text frames on /control.

direction.description: Volume step direction. Used when command is 'volume'.

value.description: Absolute volume (0-100) for command='volume', or seek position in ms for command='seek'.

level.description: Absolute volume (0-100). Used when command is 'volume_set'.

position_ms.description: Seek target in milliseconds. Used when command is 'seek'.
